page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark results place this instance in the average performance tier. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a single-core stress-ng performance of 1881.28 and a multi-core score of 15531.53, supported by L1d, L2, and L3 caches of 48 KB, 1 MB, and 48 MB respectively. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only cached small block bandwidth of 846.65 GB/sec and an uncached large block read bandwidth of 97.84 GB/sec. Cryptographic and vector operations are accelerated via hardware flags including AVX, AVX512F, AVX512_VNNI, and AES.

With its 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.g7t.4xlarge offers a balanced resource profile suitable for general-purpose workloads. It demonstrates capable performance in database operations, scoring 7509.56 in Passmark database tests, and handles Redis SET operations at 15.69 million operations per second. The instance is also suited for static web serving, software compilation, and moderate machine learning tasks, such as running smaller 135M parameter LLM inference models. The dedicated core allocation ensures predictable performance, making it a cost-efficient choice for enterprise applications requiring stable compute and memory resources without the overhead of specialized hardware.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core, and operates on the KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark data indicates solid mid-tier performance, with a multi-core stress-ng score of 15531.53 and a Passmark database operations score of 7509.56. Supported by hardware-level instruction sets like AVX-512 and AES, it delivers stable throughput for multi-threaded tasks. This instance is well-suited for general-purpose enterprise workloads, including database management, static web serving, software compilation, and moderate text or image processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for balanced enterprise workloads.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and stable memory throughput for diverse enterprise workloads.
